title: Chapter 334
content:
Chapter 334: Chapter 334

Kelly’s breathing was still a little uneven, the aftershocks of her earlier training session making her chest rise and fall against him. Her voice came out low and soft, almost as if she was telling him a secret.

"I’ve been training since before sunrise," she said. "I’m sweating... I probably stink."

She wasn’t wrong — she was damp all over, her nightwear clinging to her in patches, and now her body heat and moisture were seeping into him as well. The thin material of his shirt had already grown warm and slightly wet where she pressed against him.

But Liam didn’t pull away. Instead, he leaned in slightly and breathed her in.

"Nah," he murmured. "You smell good. Real. Natural."

Kelly rolled her eyes at that, but there was a faint curve at the corner of her lips that betrayed her. "You’re ridiculous."

He smirked. "Maybe. But I’m not lying."

His hands slid around her waist with a deliberate slowness, fingers brushing along the curve of her hip until his palms rested firmly at her lower back. "You smell good, Kelly," he repeated, his voice dropping a little deeper.

She gave a soft exhale, tilting her head as if resigning herself. "There’s no escaping you, is there?"

Liam’s smile deepened. He knew from her posture, from the lack of tension in her body, that she didn’t want to escape. Her pulse wasn’t quick from fear — it was something else entirely.

He leaned in, his mouth finding the warm skin of her neck. The first touch was feather-light, just his lips pressing there, but the effect was immediate. Her breath caught, and he felt a small shiver travel through her.

Kelly released a slow breath, her lips parting slightly as his mouth began to move upward, tasting her skin in unhurried kisses — from the hollow of her neck, along the line of her jaw, until he reached just beneath her chin.

Then he shifted to the front, his hand rising to cup her jaw gently as his lips captured hers.

Kelly’s eyes fluttered shut instantly. Her lips were soft, warm, and full, molding perfectly to his. She hesitated only a second before her hands lifted, sliding around his neck, pulling him closer.

The shift in her surprised him, and he had to plant himself more firmly on the ground to keep from being pushed backward. Her kiss was shy at first, but there was no mistaking the heat behind it.

He let his eyes close too, savoring the smoothness of her lips and the way they moved against his. His hand began to roam, slowly tracing up the side of her body — over the curve of her hip, past her waist, up along her ribs — until he reached her neck.

He broke the kiss just enough to tilt her head back slightly, his thumb brushing her skin there as his eyes locked with hers.

Desire was written plainly in them — deep brown eyes that seemed darker now, framed by long lashes and a faint sheen of sweat along her temple.

Then his gaze dropped, and he saw it.

Her nightgown, already clinging to her from sweat, had loosened at the top. A few buttons had popped open during their movement, revealing a tantalizing glimpse of her cleavage.

From his position, the view was enough to steal his focus. Her deep skin was smooth and flawless, the swell of her breasts pressing against the thin fabric. Beads of sweat caught the dim light, tracing lazy paths down her curves.

He didn’t resist.

"Liam..." she said quietly, her voice both a protest and an invitation.

Her chest rose a little faster now, her lips parting as she breathed him in.

"You don’t even know what you’re doing to me," she said softly, almost as if it slipped out without her meaning to.

Liam smiled against her skin. "I’ve got a pretty good idea."

Kelly’s head tilted forward, her forehead resting lightly against the top of his head, and for a few moments, the only sounds were her breathing.

Kelly was still wrapped around him, her arms clinging to his neck and her legs pressed close against his sides. Without warning, he slid one arm under her thighs, gripping firmly as he lifted her clean off the ground.

Her breath caught at the sudden movement, and her eyes widened slightly. He smirked, leaning in close enough for his voice to be a low whisper against her ear.

"Where’s your room?"

Kelly tilted her head just enough to glance over his shoulder. Her voice was soft, almost shy, but her eyes betrayed that spark of excitement. "Over there," she said, pointing with a small motion of her chin.

When he finally pulled back, her breasts glistened faintly from his attention, her nipples still standing firm. She was breathing hard now, her eyes locked on his with a look that was equal parts desire and challenge.
